database_info.name: Turbo HD Analog Camera Selection Theory - Standards Based
database_info.purpose: Engineering design tool for analog camera selection

1_resolution_selection.principle: Resolution determines detail level and pixel density at target distance

tiers.best_for: Enhanced detail, face recognition at closer range, license plates
tiers.note: Good balance of detail vs storage

tiers.best_for: Wide area with high detail, forensic quality, large open spaces
tiers.note: Requires HUHI DVR and more storage

ppf_requirements.detection: 25 PPM (pixels per meter) — detect presence of person
ppf_requirements.identification: 250 PPM — identify unknown individual (court evidence quality)

2_form_factor_selection.principle: Camera form determines mounting, aesthetics, and vandal resistance

types.advantages: Compact, versatile angle, no IR reflection on dome cover, easy aim adjustment
Long IR range, visible deterrent, wall/ceiling mount, built-in sun shade
types.best_for: Outdoor perimeter, parking lots, building facades, long corridors

types.advantages: Discrete, vandal-resistant (IK10), difficult to determine aim direction
types.disadvantages: IR reflection on dome cover possible, harder to aim
types.best_for: Vandal-prone areas, public spaces, retail, elevators

3_lens_selection.principle: Lens focal length determines field of view and detail at distance

fixed_lenses.best_for: Standard wide: rooms, entrances, retail — MOST COMMON
Medium: parking lots, hallways, building perimeter — MOST COMMON
Narrow: long corridors, fence lines, specific targets

3_lens_selection.selection_rule: 2.8mm for areas up to 15m wide. 3.6mm for areas 10-25m deep. 6mm for 25-50m corridors. Motorized for uncertain scenes.

4_ir_range_selection.principle: IR range must exceed maximum target distance in complete darkness

ranges.best_for: Standard outdoor, parking bays, building entrances
Long perimeter, large parking lots, fence lines
Very long range, industrial perimeter, open fields

4_ir_range_selection.exir_technology: Hikvision EXIR provides uniform IR illumination without hot spots. EXIR 2.0 offers even longer range and lower power.

5_colorvu_vs_standard_ir.principle: ColorVu provides full-color 24/7 using white LEDs. Standard uses IR for B&W night vision.

comparison.disadvantage: No color at night, harder to identify clothing/vehicle color

comparison.advantage: Full color 24/7, better evidence quality, identifies colors
comparison.disadvantage: Visible white light may cause light pollution

comparison.night_image: IR default, white LED on motion
comparison.advantage: Best of both — covert monitoring + color on events
Natural color in low light without LEDs

5_colorvu_vs_standard_ir.recommendation: For evidence quality (clothing/vehicle color) → ColorVu. For covert surveillance → Standard IR. For mixed → Smart Hybrid Light.

6_cable_and_power.principle: Turbo HD cameras use coaxial cable for video and separate power

utp_with_balun.note: Use passive balun up to 200m for 1080p. Active balun for longer.

poc.note: Power + video on single coax. Requires PoC-compatible DVR (HTHI series).

power.standard_power: 12VDC ±25%, separate PSU or centralized power supply
power.voltage_drop: Calculate voltage drop for runs >30m. Use thicker cable or higher voltage (24VAC) for long runs.

7_weatherproofing_and_vandal.principle: IP and IK ratings must match installation environment

IP66.use: Outdoor — heavy rain, car wash areas

housing_material.plastic: Budget, indoor or sheltered outdoor. UV-rated for outdoor models.
housing_material.metal: Pro series. Better heat dissipation, vandal resistance, durability. Metal housing models indicated by M suffix or Pro series.

8_field_of_view_calculation.principle: Calculate scene coverage to ensure target area is fully covered
8_field_of_view_calculation.overlap_rule: Design for 10-15% overlap between adjacent camera fields of view to eliminate blind spots.

9_dvr_compatibility.principle: Camera resolution must not exceed DVR maximum supported resolution

compatibility_matrix.note: Power over Coax requires HTHI DVR

9_dvr_compatibility.ip_channel_note: All Turbo HD DVRs also support IP cameras on additional channels (typically +2 or +4 IP channels)

10_compliance_standards.principle: Cameras must meet safety, EMC, and environmental standards
